zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Bourchier於大約1330年出生在英國艾可哈爾斯亞德時，他的父親Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier24歲，母親Margaret Prayers24歲。他於1359年與Eleanor Louvain結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1375年7月5日在英國艾可蕾托 伊斯頓享年46歲，埋葬在英國艾可蕾托 伊斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Bourchier于大约1330年出生在英国艾可哈爾斯亞德时，他的父亲Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier24岁，母亲Margaret Prayers24岁。他于1359年与Eleanor Louvain结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1375年7月5日在英国艾可蕾托 伊斯頓享年46岁，埋葬在英国艾可蕾托 伊斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Bourchier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: perhaps a variant of   Burcher   (  see  Bircher  ). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2). The name has sometimes been altered to or confused with   Bouchier   and   Boucher  .

2 Norman, English: locative name of uncertain origin but it is presumably from a French place-name, perhaps Boursières in Haute-Saône. The name was early confused with other surnames and may survive in Bouchier, Bowcher, Bowser, and Boozer . The surname gave rise to a number of minor place-names in Essex: Bourchier’s alias Bouchier’s Hall in Aldham, Bourchier’s Hall in Messing; Bouchier’s Grange in Great Coggeshall, Bouchiers Chapel in Tollesbury, Boarstye Fm and Bowser’s Hall in Rivenhall (Essex), and Boose’s Green in Colne Engayne.

variants.name: Bourcier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Lucien, Armand, Emile.
French: variant of   Boursier   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
History: The (majority of the) American bearers of the surname Bourcier are descendants of Jean Boursier dit Lavigne from France (see Boursier ).

variants.name: Bircher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Albrecht, Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ulrich.
South German and Swiss German: topographic name for someone who lived by a birch tree or in a birch wood, from Middle High German birche ‘birch’ + the suffix -er denoting an inhabitant.
English: habitational name from Birchover in Derbyshire or Bircher in Hereford, both named as from Old English birce ‘birch’ + ofer ‘ridge’.

variants.name: Bouchier
meanings: 1  English: variant of   Butcher  .
2  English: alternatively a variant of   Belcher  .
3  Norman, English: possibly a variant of   Bourchier   (2).

variants.name: Bowser
meanings: English: nickname from either from Old French beu cher ‘good company’, or from Old French beu sire ‘fair sir’ (see Belcher ), given either to a fine gentleman (perhaps ironically), or to someone who made frequent use of this term of address. Compare Bonser and Boozer .
English: variant of   Bolsover  .
Americanized form of German   Bauser  .

variants.name: Boozer
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German   Buser  .
English (Kent): variant of   Bowser   1.

variants.name: Burcher
meanings: English: variant of   Bircher  .

variants.name: Boucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Yvon, Adrien, Jacques, Laurent, Alcide.

French: occupational name for a butcher or slaughterer, from Old French bouchier, a derivative of bouc ‘ram’. Compare Bouche 2, Bouchey , Bouchie , Boushey , Boushie , Bush 5, Busha 1, Busher , and Bushey 3.
English: variant of   Butcher  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Borger
meanings: North German (also Börger) and Dutch: variant of Burger .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname from Yiddish borger ‘borrower’ or ‘lender’.
Norwegian and Swedish: habitational name for someone from a place called Borg (see   Borg  ), or a topographic name for someone living by a fortification or near a hill resembling a fortification.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Bourchier was born about 1330, in Halstead, Essex, England, his father, Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Prayers, was 24. He married Eleanor Louvain in 1359. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 5 July 1375, in Little Easton, Essex, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Little Easton, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Bourchier est né environ 1330, à Halstead, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Prayers, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Louvain en 1359. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 5 juillet 1375, à Little Easton, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Little Easton, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Bourchier um 1330 in Halstead, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Prayers 24. Er hat 1359 Eleanor Louvain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 5. Juli 1375 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Little Easton, Essex, England und wurde in Little Easton, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Bourchier è nato il circa 1330 nel Halstead, Essex, England, il suo padre, Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Prayers, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Louvain nel 1359. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 5 luglio 1375, nel Little Easton, Essex, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Little Easton, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Bourchierが約1330年にイギリスエセックスハルステアドで生まれた時，父Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchierは24歳，母Margaret Prayersは24歳であった。1359年にEleanor Louvainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1375年7月5日にイギリスエセックスリットル エアストンで46歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスリットル エアストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Bourchier(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 에세스 할스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Prayers(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1359년 Eleanor Louvain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1375년 7월 5일 영국 에세스 리틀 이스트에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 리틀 이스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Bourchier nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Halstead, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Prayers, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Louvain em 1359. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 5 de julho de 1375, em Little Easton, Essex, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Little Easton, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Bourchier родился около 1330 г. в местности холстид, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Prayers, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Louvain в 1359 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 5 июля 1375 г. в местности литл эастон, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности литл эастон, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Bourchier nació aproximadamente 1330, en Halstead, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Bourchier, 1st Baron Bourchier, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Prayers, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Eleanor Louvain en 1359. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 5 de julio de 1375, en Little Easton, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Little Easton, Essex, Inglaterra.
